title: creeper-apocalypse
description:
Mob Replacement System
ALL mobs spawn as Creepers! with exceptions
    Exceptions that remain normal
         Blazes you still need blaze rods!
        Villagers or trading
         Ender Dragon final boss remains
        Iron Golem
body:
# 🧨 Creeper Apocalypse Escalation
(BETA! SOME DON"T WORK AND SOME WORK!)
**Every mob spawn becomes a creeper. Every day, more spawn. Can you survive?**

This mod turns your Minecraft world into a chaotic challenge run. It features a sophisticated replacement system that swaps normal mobs for Creepers, slowly ramping up the difficulty day by day until you are facing swarms of explosive enemies.

---

## 📋 Features

### 🔄 Mob Replacement System
*   **ALL mobs spawn as Creepers!**
*   **Safe exceptions:** Blazes, Villagers, and the Ender Dragon remain normal so the game is still beatable.
*   **Configurable:** Choose which mobs get replaced in the config menu.

### 📈 Auto-Escalation System
*   **Day 1:** Normal spawn rates (1x)
*   **Day 10:** Chaos (10x spawns!)
*   Spawn multiplier increases automatically every day.

### 🧬 9 Special Creeper Variants
New variants spawn starting from Day 3, each with unique abilities:

| Variant | Special Ability |
| :--- | :--- |
| 🐁 **Mini Creeper** | Tiny, super fast, hard to hit |
| 🦖 **Giant Creeper** | Massive size, slow, huge explosion radius |
| 🕷️ **Spider Creeper** | Climbs walls like a spider |
| 🥷 **Ninja Creeper** | Turns invisible when standing still |
| 🌈 **Rainbow Creeper** | Drops random loot when killed |
| 🏀 **Bouncy Creeper** | Jumps incredibly high |
| 🤠 **Jockey Creeper** | Rides other creepers into battle |
| 💖 **Happy Creeper** | Friendly! Buffs players instead of hurting them |
| ⚡ **Lightning Creeper** | Boss-tier, always charged, extreme speed |

**Unique Feature:** The **Super Charged Lightning Creeper** (Day 7+) features a custom PURPLE energy aura!

### 🎯 Milestone Events
*   **Day 5 - Blood Moon:** All creepers glow red and can be seen through walls.
*   **Day 7 - Charged Day:** 25% of all creepers spawn naturally charged.
*   **Day 10 - The Swarm:** Spawn rates gain a massive +50% bonus.

### 📊 Full Statistics & GUI
*   **In-Game Menu:** Press `K` (or use Pause Menu) to configure spawn limits, disable "No Day" mode, or adjust variant chances.
*   **Stats Overlay:** Press `J` to see your kills, death count, and survived explosions in real-time.
*   **Streamer Ready:** Features auto-screenshots on death and chat commands.

---

## 🔧 Installation

1.  Requires **Fabric Loader** for Minecraft 1.21.11
2.  Requires **Fabric API**
3.  Drop `creeper-apocalypse-escalation-1.0.0.jar` into your `mods` folder.

---

## ⚙️ Configuration

Press `ESC` -> `Creeper Challenge Settings` to configure everything in-game!
*   Adjust spawn rate caps
*   Toggle specific variants
*   Enable/Disable the entire mod
*   Set "No Day Mode" for a randomized challenge
